message:
test(session): add resumability tests for plan execution workflow

Covers clean resume, PID reuse detection, process exit handling,
partial-then-resume, idempotency, UID change, corrupted state,
mixed outcomes, dead process, serialization roundtrip, and
persist-plan-then-resume integration.

Closes process_triage-jxtp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
